tasks.message: Create a minimal Node.js project at /workspace/myapp with: package.json (name: myapp, version: 1.0.0), src/index.js that exports a function 'greet(name)' returning 'Hello, {name}!', and a test.js that requires src/index.js and logs the result of greet('World').

tasks.description: Read CSV, compute stats, write report
tasks.message: Read /workspace/sales.csv. Calculate the total revenue (sum of the 'amount' column) and the number of rows. Write a report to /workspace/report.txt with lines: 'Total rows: N' and 'Total revenue: X'.

tasks.description: Create a Python module with tests and run them
tasks.message: Create a Python module at /workspace/mathlib/calc.py with functions: add(a,b), subtract(a,b), multiply(a,b). Then create /workspace/mathlib/test_calc.py using assert statements to test all three functions. Run the tests with: python3 /workspace/mathlib/test_calc.py

tasks.description: Process log files and generate summary
tasks.message: Analyze /workspace/app.log: count occurrences of each log level (INFO, WARN, ERROR). Write /workspace/summary.json with format: {"INFO": N, "WARN": N, "ERROR": N}.

tasks.description: Initialize a git repo with proper structure
tasks.message: Create a project at /workspace/project: initialize a git repo, create a .gitignore (ignore node_modules/ and .env), create a README.md with '# My Project', create src/main.py with 'print("hello")', then make an initial commit with message 'Initial commit'.
